spectrumModmailWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 1 — Modmail
spectrumModmailWebhook.helpText: Modmail alerts for your primary community. Also used for mod queue and new posts if Webhooks 3 or 5 are left blank. Add your Discord Bot Token below to enable buttons.

spectrumOfficialModmailWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 2 — Modmail
spectrumOfficialModmailWebhook.helpText: Modmail alerts for your secondary community. Also used for mod queue and new posts if Webhooks 4 or 6 are left blank.

spectrumModQueueWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 3 — Mod Queue
spectrumModQueueWebhook.helpText: Mod queue alerts (reports, AutoMod) for your primary community. Falls back to Webhook 1 if left blank.

spectrumOfficialModQueueWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 4 — Mod Queue
spectrumOfficialModQueueWebhook.helpText: Mod queue alerts (reports, AutoMod) for your secondary community. Falls back to Webhook 2 if left blank.

spectrumNewPostsWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 5 — New Posts
spectrumNewPostsWebhook.helpText: New post alerts for your primary community. Falls back to Webhook 1 if left blank.

spectrumOfficialNewPostsWebhook.label: Discord Webhook 6 — New Posts
spectrumOfficialNewPostsWebhook.helpText: New post alerts for your secondary community. Falls back to Webhook 2 if left blank.

reportingWebhook.label: Webhook URL for the shared daily reporting channel

discordApplicationPublicKey.label: Discord Application Public Key
discordApplicationPublicKey.helpText: From Discord Developer Portal → General Information → Public Key. Must match the DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY secret on your Cloudflare Worker.

discordInteractionsWorkerUrl.label: Cloudflare Worker URL (Discord interactions)
discordInteractionsWorkerUrl.helpText: Your deployed worker URL, e.g. https://modmail.your-name.workers.dev — also set this as the Interactions Endpoint URL in the Discord Developer Portal.

discordInteractionsWorkerSecret.label: Cloudflare Worker shared secret
discordInteractionsWorkerSecret.helpText: Same random string set as WORKER_SECRET in Cloudflare. Required so button clicks can find the matching ticket.

discordBotToken.label: Discord Bot Token
discordBotToken.helpText: Required for Claim/Close/Reassign buttons. From Discord Developer Portal → Bot → Reset Token. Must be the same application as your Interactions Endpoint. Also add as DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN on your Cloudflare Worker.

outgoing.label: Send outgoing mod messages to Discord

ignoreUsers.label: Ignore list (comma-separated usernames, don't include u/)
ignoreUsers.helpText: Add Reddit usernames (case-insensitive) separated by commas to skip them from webhook payloads.

rolePing.label: Discord Role ID to Ping
rolePing.helpText: Enter a Discord Role ID to ping when a message is sent. Leave blank to disable.

onlyModDiscussions.label: Only Sync Mod Discussions
onlyModDiscussions.helpText: If enabled, only mod discussion messages will be sent to the webhook.
